creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
romain      2010-06-05 13:13:38 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    irc                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    irc/smartirc4net     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  SmartIrc4net is a multi-threaded and thread-safe IRC library written in C#. It
  allows you to communicate with IRC servers. The API features full channel
  syncing and is splitted in 3 layers: IrcConnection, IrcCommands and IrcClient.
  
  WWW:    http://smartirc4net.meebey.net/jaws/
  
  PR:             ports/141443
  Submitted by:   Romain Tartiere <romain at blogreen.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.199     +1 -0      ports/irc/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/irc/smartirc4net/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/irc/smartirc4net/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/irc/smartirc4net/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/irc/smartirc4net/pkg-plist (new)
